original_image_tags: Aged, off-white typed letter. Top right corner has a handwritten signature/initials in blue ink. Top left corner has handwritten numbers "#4" and "Jm" in blue ink.

elements.description: A typed letter dated July 11, 1947, addressed to 'Dear Sir' discussing 'mysterious Saucers' and 'startling discs'. It includes a signature block for 'The Combined and Amalgamated Committee of Sky-Scanners, Disc Decipherers and New-Product Introducers'.
A purple stamp in the top left corner reading 'ANONYMOUS OBSERVATION' and 'KEEP ENVELOPE ATTACHED'.
A purple stamp in the bottom right corner reading 'RECORDED' with the handwritten number '62-83894-6' and '37 JUL 21 1947' below it.
Handwritten annotations in blue ink on the left margin reading 'of Flying Saucers', along with other faint markings and scribbles in the top right and bottom corners.

judge.reason: The two descriptions refer to completely different visual content, with Description A mentioning handwritten numbers in blue ink on an aged letter, while Description B describes purple stamps, specific quoted text, and different annotations.
